tolerances.reason: Opacity comparisons use normalized unit-interval values from lottie-web and PureLottie; this threshold only absorbs floating-point representation noise.

witness.reason: This threshold is an asserted PureLottie tolerance pending the derived arithmetic bound required by issue #104.

tolerances.reason: Translation is compared after lottie-web SVG matrix extraction and PureLottie source evaluation; five hundredths of a CSS pixel separates numeric intent from raster inspection noise.

witness.reason: This threshold is an asserted PureLottie tolerance pending the derived arithmetic bound required by issue #104.

tolerances.reason: Precomposition and time-remap comparisons use Lottie source-frame coordinates before seconds conversion or backend rendering, so only floating-point representation noise is tolerated.

witness.reason: This threshold is an asserted PureLottie tolerance pending the derived arithmetic bound required by issue #104.

tolerances.reason: Bounds compare geometric source facts, not pixels; this threshold covers SVG floating-point serialization while still rejecting visible coordinate drift.

witness.reason: This threshold is an asserted PureLottie tolerance pending the derived arithmetic bound required by issue #104.

tolerances.reason: Path length comparisons are numeric geometry checks produced by lottie-web getTotalLength and PureLottie source geometry, so only floating-point noise is tolerated.

witness.reason: This threshold is an asserted PureLottie tolerance pending the derived arithmetic bound required by issue #104.

tolerances.reason: Trim segment comparisons use normalized start and end fractions before backend rasterization; this threshold covers only floating-point fraction representation noise.

witness.reason: This threshold is an asserted PureLottie tolerance pending the derived arithmetic bound required by issue #104.

tolerances.reason: Pixel comparison defaults to exact RGBA channel equality; any non-zero threshold must be deliberately requested and recorded separately before visual artifacts are trusted.

witness.reason: This threshold is an asserted PureLottie tolerance pending the derived arithmetic bound required by issue #104.
